Class UpgradeScene

java.lang.Object
gui.UpgradeScene
public class UpgradeScene extends Object
The UpgradeScene class renders the hero upgrade screen that appears after victory.

This scene allows the player to select exactly one hero from the current team and apply an upgrade (via GameEngine.upgradingHero()). The upgraded hero is stored in GameEngine.getUpgradeHero().

Main responsibilities:

  • Set the game state to GameState.UPGRADE
  • Reset the current upgrade selection
  • Display selectable hero icons from GameEngine.getHeroTEAM()
  • Highlight the currently selected hero (glow + scale animation)
  • Apply upgrade and navigate to RollElementScene when Next is clicked

Selection rules:

  • Only one hero can be selected at a time
  • Clicking the same hero again will unselect it
  • Selecting a new hero will automatically clear the previous selection

  • Field Details

    • resetCurrentSelection

      private static Runnable resetCurrentSelection
      Stores a runnable that resets the previously selected hero button.

      This is used to enforce single-selection behavior without a ToggleGroup.

  • Constructor Details

    • UpgradeScene

      public UpgradeScene()

  • Method Details

    • show

      public static void show(javafx.stage.Stage stage, GameEngine gameEngine)
      Shows the upgrade scene on the given stage.

      This method:

      • Sets the game state to GameState.UPGRADE
      • Clears any previously selected upgrade hero
      • Builds the UI layout with background, hero selection, and Next button
      • Disables window resizing and enforces fixed size (1280 by 720)

      Navigation:

      • Back button goes to VictoryScene.show(Stage, GameEngine)
      • Next button upgrades the selected hero and goes to RollElementScene.show(Stage, GameEngine)
      Parameters:
      stage - the JavaFX stage used to display this scene
      gameEngine - the main game engine instance used for state and navigation

    • createCharacterButton

      public static javafx.scene.control.Button createCharacterButton(String imagePath1, Heroes hero)
      Creates a selectable hero icon button for upgrade selection.

      Behavior:

      • Click once: selects this hero for upgrade, applies glow, and scales up
      • Click again: unselects, removes glow, and resets scale
      • Selecting a different hero automatically resets the previous selection

      Selection is stored in GameEngine.setUpgradeHero(Heroes).

      Parameters:
      imagePath1 - resource path for the hero icon image
      hero - the hero represented by this button
      Returns:
      a clickable JavaFX Button representing the hero selection

    • createButton

      private static javafx.scene.control.Button createButton(String path)
      Creates an image-based button with hover scaling, glow effect, and press animation.

      This is a reusable UI helper for scene navigation buttons (Back, Next, etc.).

      Parameters:
      path - the resource path of the button image
      Returns:
      a styled JavaFX Button

    • nextBtnOnClickHandler

      private static boolean nextBtnOnClickHandler(javafx.stage.Stage stage, GameEngine gameEngine)
      Handles the "Next" button action for upgrading a hero.

      If no hero is selected, an error dialog is shown and the method returns false.

      If a hero is selected, GameEngine.upgradingHero() is executed and the scene transitions to RollElementScene.show(Stage, GameEngine). The method returns true.

      Parameters:
      stage - the JavaFX stage used for navigation
      gameEngine - the main game engine instance
      Returns:
      true if upgrade was applied and navigation occurred, otherwise false
